name: Shenzhen Capol International & Associates Co.,Ltd
summary: Shenzhen Capol International & Associates Co., Ltd provides architectural design services. It also offers urban planning, engineering cost consulting, industrialization research and design, BIM design and consulting, EPC project general contracting and whole process engineering consulting, agency construction management, construction services, and prefabricated component development and manufacturing services. The company is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
